summary: A Go-based CLI tool for migrating, detecting, and running Goss tests with Kubernetes support and a plugin system.
concerns: Recent commits are dominated by automated session metadata commits adding noise to git history
Untracked and staged files present during a failed build state
ClaudeDesktop/specs directory suggests non-standard test placement
suggestions: Fix the failing build immediately to unblock development
Configure .gitignore to exclude automated session metadata files from version control
Move ClaudeDesktop/specs to a standard Go test location or document the testing strategy
Investigate the untracked file to determine if it is critical to the build failure
